title: Soulection Radio Show #434 (Sango & Xavier Omär Radio)
content: [Sango](https://sangobeats.com/home) and [Xaiver Omär](https://www.xavieromar.com/) take over  Soulection Radio to perform music from [#MomentsSpentLovingYou](https://music.apple.com/us/album/moments-spent-loving-you/1484140449?at=1010lMz4) & Sango drops an exclusive mix.
